title: Startup migration repair for publisher flag drift

source.subject: fix: harden startup migration repair for publisher flag

body:
## Outcome

Harden startup migration repair for publisher flag.

## Context

- Workstream **pckg-registry** — registry and PackageDocs UI.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `pckg`
- **Commit:** [`27621c1`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pckg/commit/27621c1) — fix: harden startup migration repair for publisher flag
